fields.name: Source_id
fields.description: A unique number that identifies the Source, starting from zero

fields.name: Isl_id
fields.description: A unique number that identifies the Island, starting from zero

fields.name: RA
fields.description: The right ascension of the source (for the equinox of the image)

fields.name: E_RA
fields.description: The error on the right ascension of the source

fields.name: DEC
fields.description: The declination of the source (for the equinox of the image)

fields.name: E_DEC
fields.description: The 1-sigma error on the declination of the source

fields.name: Total_flux
fields.description: The total, integrated Stokes I flux density of the source at the reference frequency

fields.name: E_Total_flux
fields.description: The 1-sigma error on the total flux density of the source

fields.name: Peak_flux
fields.description: The peak Stokes I flux density per beam of the source

fields.name: E_Peak_flux
fields.description: The 1-sigma error on the peak flux density per beam of the source

fields.name: Maj
fields.description: The FWHM of the major axis of the source

fields.name: E_Maj
fields.description: The 1-sigma error on the FWHM of the major axis of the source

fields.name: Min
fields.description: The FWHM of the minor axis of the source

fields.name: E_Min
fields.description: The 1-sigma error on the FWHM of the minor axis of the source

fields.name: PA
fields.description: The position angle of the major axis of the source measured east of north

fields.name: E_PA
fields.description: The 1-sigma error on the position angle of the major axis of the source

fields.name: DC_Maj
fields.description: The FWHM of the deconvolved major axis of the source

fields.name: Isl_rms
fields.description: The average background rms value of the island (derived from the rms map)

fields.name: Resid_Isl_rms
fields.description: The average residual background rms value of the island (derived from the residual map, after subtraction of fitted Gaussians)

fields.name: S_Code
fields.description: A code that defines the source structure ('S', 'C', or 'M')
